text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the autumn Tenno Sho, and the
spectators are feverish at the thought of the two
Takarazuka Kinen rivals clashing again.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy! You're the best! We wanna see you win!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Sweep's victory was no miracle! She's gonna show
us another red-hot win for sure!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Pffft haha. This is like a fairy tale face-off. We've
got Zenno Rob Roy, the hero, and then Sweep
Tosho, the witch.

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
But fairy tales are fun, y'know? That's why I'm so
excited to see what happens.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...I ended up coming to watch after all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sneak, sneak...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
...Haha. And she's been following me this whole
time. I guess she's still worried about what
happened before.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: You don't have to worry. I quit for my own reasons.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: After I watch this race, I'm calling it quits.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Rob Royyy!
Go, Sweeep!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: These cheers for Sweep are really something.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's her magic. Sweep hasn't changed at
all since before. Actually, no—she's been getting
more and more amazing.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
If I had felt the same way, and thought the way
things are were lame...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sneak, sneak...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Hey, Kawakami. Let's watch the race together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh... Um...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You noticed I was here, huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like you're any good at hiding. I
noticed you as soon as I left the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so... How do you want this race to turn out,
Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Like, who do you want to win? What are you
hoping to see?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I hope she gets to cast her magic.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Looks like we both want the same thing, then.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
There are quite a lot of people watching the
autumn Tenno Sho this year.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, the crowds are huge.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(...! Kawakami's here! And look who's with her!
...She really came.)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...That's more like it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: What was that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nothing. Hey, Rob Roy. We've got to make today's race one to remember. I've gotta cast my magic and blow everyone's lame assumptions away.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold anything back. That'll help me run my
best too.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... If I'm racing you, I don't have any choice
but to give all I've got.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to summon every ounce of courage I
have... all in order to defeat you.
